lore.english:
Taimanin. Shishimura Koro's cousin. Top member of the 4th division within "Katonshu", a group within the Fire Art Taimanins. At Gosha Academy, he serves as the head of the Science Club and is nicknamed the “Demolition Specialist.” Hailed as a once‑in‑a‑century genius, she nevertheless tends to follow her own pace without regard for those around her, which makes some people a bit wary of her. She has a sweet tooth and always carries sugar cubes in her pocket.

She uses Explosion Art, an ability that allows her to turn any inanimate object she touches with her right hand into a bomb. These bombs can be programmed with various detonation conditions, enabling her to control them with delicate precision. She often transforms her sugar cubes into bombs, cleverly using small‑scale explosions to her advantage.
